text:
* Bryan Drewery (bdrewery@FreeBSD.org) wrote:

> It's probably better to just add in a 'break' after the echo. No need to
> loop and look more.

Maybe count libraries instead and display a count if it's > 1? It's nice
to know of duplicates (base system vs. ports, lib/compat/pkg etc.)
